paperTitle: HiF-VLA: Hindsight, Insight and Foresight through Motion Representation for Vision-Language-Action Models
organization: Westlake University / Zhejiang University / HKUST(GZ) / Nanjing University / Westlake Robotics

benchmarks.label: CALVIN
benchmarks.detail: Tasks: chain 1 98.5 · chain 2 94.1 · chain 3 88.1 · chain 4 81.4 · chain 5 73.1 | Table 2 | Notes: ABC→D split, 1000 chains, avg_len metric reported. Multi-view (third-person + wrist) setting.

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Tasks: reported avg 96.4 | Table 1 | Notes: Paper reports only LIBERO-Long (avg success rate 96.4% with multi-view). Suite-level breakdown not provided for the other 3 suites, so cannot confirm standard 4-suite average. This is the LIBERO-Long multi-view success rate.
